title: biscutella lima
intro: Biscutella lima, also known as the alpine biscutella, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Biscutella lima include its ability to soothe sore throats and reduce fever, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Biscutella lima typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
